sections.paragraph:
- Original: Φλέγων

- Transliteration: Phlegon

- Phonetic: fleg'-one

- Definition: Phlegon = "burning"

1. a resident at Rome greeted by Paul of the book of Romans

- Origin: active participle of the base of G5395

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Active participle of the base of G5395; blazing; Phlegon a Christian: - Phlegon.
